user.title: Cambridge Audio CXA
user.description: Connect to your Cambridge Audio CXA amplifier via ser2net running on a Raspberry Pi (or any network-accessible serial bridge).

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the device running ser2net
data_description.name: Friendly name shown in Home Assistant

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to ser2net at the given host and port. Make sure ser2net is running and reachable.
